Container.Name: taplist-frontend
Container.Overview: Taplist Frontend — A beer tap list display app built with React and served via nginx. Shows current beers on tap with style, ABV, IBU, and SRM details. NOTE: The backend API URL is baked in at build time. Rebuild the image after updating src/services/api.ts if your backend IP/port changes.

Config.Name: Web Port
Config.Description: Port to access the tap list web UI.
